name: Beike Tripod Q 666
description: Beike Q-666 Professional Traveller's Ballhead Tripod with Monopod is a compact tripod for those who are looking for something very compact for travelling use but with strength to handle extra weight.

features.Key Features:: Folded Length: 350mm | Max Height: 1545mm | Weight: 1450g | Material: Aluminum | Max. Load Capacity: 8kg | Head Type: 360 degree Swivel Fluid Head | Carrying bag included
